title: scrophularia sambucifolia subvar. viridiflora
intro: Scrophularia sambucifolia subvar. viridiflora, also known as the green-flowered figwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia sambucifolia subvar. viridiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
